result.summary: Google Cloud Network Connectivity exposes a REST API at `https://networkconnectivity.googleapis.com/v1` authenticated with Google Cloud bearer access tokens; the docs also reference gcloud commands, but those target the same API rather than a separate domain-specific CLI surface.
result.description: Google Cloud Network Connectivity provides APIs for managing connectivity between Google Cloud resources, including hubs, spokes, route tables, and related network connectivity objects. It is part of Google Cloud's networking services.

gcp_bearer.label: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access token
gcp_bearer.setup: Authenticate to Google Cloud and mint an access token using the easiest supported path from [Authenticate with REST](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/rest), such as running `gcloud auth print-access-token` after signing in with the [gcloud CLI authentication flow](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/authenticate), or by configuring [Application Default Credentials](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/provide-credentials-adc) for code. Use the resulting token as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
